/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/datafeed.dir/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datafeed.dir/session/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datafeed.dir/live_source/live_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datafeed.dir/backtest_source/backtest_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datafeed.dir/utils/error.cpp.o -o datafeed  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/postgresql@14/libpq.dylib libbroker.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_date_time.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
